name: Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc (Vinpearl Wonderworld Phu Quoc)
address: Ganh Dau, Gành Dầu, Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam
description:
Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc - Kỳ quan của thiên đường nghỉ dưỡng

Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc là một khách sạn 5 sao tọa lạc tại Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam. Với 306 phòng nghỉ sang trọng và tiện nghi, khách sạn mang đến cho du khách một trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời. Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc được xây dựng vào năm 2017 và đã được tu sửa lại vào năm 2019, đảm bảo rằng du khách sẽ có những trải nghiệm thoải mái và hiện đại nhất.

Khách sạn có thời gian nhận phòng từ 02:00 PM và thời gian trả phòng đến 12:00 PM, giúp du khách linh hoạt trong việc sắp xếp lịch trình của mình. Với khoảng cách chỉ khoảng 45 phút đến sân bay, du khách có thể dễ dàng di chuyển và tiết kiệm thời gian.

Đối với chính sách trẻ em, khách sạn không cho phép trẻ em ở miễn phí và có thể áp dụng phụ phí. Tuy nhiên, với không gian và dịch vụ chăm sóc trẻ em chuyên nghiệp, Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc là một lựa chọn lý tưởng cho những gia đình muốn có kỳ nghỉ thú vị cùng nhau.

Trung tâm giải trí đa dạng tại Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc

Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc là một khu nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời tại Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam với nhiều tiện nghi giải trí đa dạng. Du khách có thể tìm thấy một loạt cửa hàng, sòng bạc và quầy bar tại khu vực này, đảm bảo mang đến những trải nghiệm thú vị. Ngoài ra, khu vực này còn có một salon làm đẹp, nơi du khách có thể thư giãn với các liệu pháp mát-xa chuyên nghiệp. Nếu bạn muốn thư giãn hơn, bạn có thể tận hưởng những phút giây thư giãn tại bồn tắm nước nóng, phòng xông hơi, hoặc phòng xông hơi. Để tận hưởng thêm cảm giác thư giãn, du khách có thể ghé thăm spa của khu nghỉ dưỡng. Ngoài ra, khu vườn xanh mát và cửa hàng quà lưu niệm cũng là những điểm đặc biệt mà Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc mang đến cho du khách.

Tiện nghi thể thao tại Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc

Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc tọa lạc tại Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam, là một khu nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời cho những ai yêu thích các hoạt động thể thao. Khách sạn này cung cấp nhiều tiện nghi thể thao, bao gồm một hồ bơi trong nhà tuyệt đẹp, phòng tập thể dục hiện đại và các hoạt động thể thao trên nước như lái xe nước. 

Ngoài ra, Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc còn có một hồ bơi ngoài trời tuyệt đẹp nằm trong khuôn viên rộng lớn của khách sạn. Du khách cũng có thể tận hưởng bãi biển riêng tư của khách sạn và tham gia các hoạt động thể thao trên biển như lướt ván và thuê thiết bị thể thao trên nước. Nếu bạn yêu thích bãi biển và muốn rèn luyện thân thể, khách sạn còn cung cấp phòng tập thể dục miễn phí cho khách hàng. 

Với những tiện nghi thể thao đẳng cấp và không gian tuyệt đẹp, Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những du khách yêu thích thể thao và muốn tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ đáng nhớ tại Đảo Phú Quốc.

Tiện nghi tiện lợi tại Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc

Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc tọa lạc tại Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam và mang đến cho du khách những tiện nghi tiện lợi đáng kinh ngạc. Khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ phòng 24 giờ, giặt ủi, dịch vụ phòng, hòm đựng đồ giá trị, lễ tân, Wi-Fi miễn phí tại các khu vực công cộng và trong phòng, dịch vụ giặt là, giữ hành lý, cửa hàng tiện lợi và dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày. 

Với dịch vụ phòng 24 giờ, du khách có thể yên tâm tận hưởng tiện nghi mọi lúc trong ngày. Dịch vụ giặt ủi và dịch vụ phòng sẽ đảm bảo quần áo luôn sạch sẽ và gọn gàng. Hòm đựng đồ giá trị và dịch vụ giữ hành lý sẽ giúp du khách bảo vệ tài sản và tiện lợi di chuyển. 

Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn có cửa hàng tiện lợi để du khách có thể mua sắm và tiếp tục tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ. Wi-Fi miễn phí trong phòng và các khu vực công cộng sẽ giúp du khách kết nối với thế giới bên ngoài. Dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày sẽ đảm bảo không gian sống luôn sạch sẽ và thoải mái. Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc cam kết mang đến cho du khách những tiện nghi tiện lợi để tạo nên một trải nghiệm kỳ nghỉ đáng nhớ.

Tiện nghi vận chuyển tại Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc

Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc tọa lạc tại Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam, là một khu nghỉ dưỡng đẳng cấp với các tiện ích vận chuyển đa dạng. Khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ đưa đón sân bay, giúp du khách thuận tiện và dễ dàng đến và đi từ sân bay. Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn cung cấp tour du lịch để khám phá những điểm đến hấp dẫn trên đảo.

Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc cũng có dịch vụ đậu xe valet và bãi đậu xe tự phục vụ, giúp khách hàng thoải mái khi đến và đi. Nếu bạn muốn di chuyển trong khu vực, khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ xe đưa đón để đưa bạn đến các điểm tham quan và mua sắm. Ngoài ra, khách sạn cũng có dịch vụ đặt vé và dịch vụ taxi, giúp khách hàng tiện lợi khi đi lại trong thành phố. Với những tiện ích vận chuyển đa dạng này, Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc sẽ đáp ứng mọi nhu cầu của du khách.

Tiện Nghi Ẩm Thực Đẳng Cấp Tại Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc

Tại Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc, du khách sẽ được trải nghiệm dịch vụ ẩm thực đa dạng và tiện nghi. Khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ phòng 24 giờ, giúp bạn dễ dàng thưởng thức các món ăn yêu thích bất cứ lúc nào trong ngày. Thưởng thức bữa sáng buffet phong phú hoặc lựa chọn bữa sáng kiểu lục địa để bắt đầu ngày mới tràn đầy năng lượng. Đặc biệt, nhà hàng của khách sạn còn có khu vực BBQ ngoài trời, lý tưởng cho những buổi tiệc nướng ngoài trời cùng gia đình và bạn bè.

Ngoài ra, Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc còn có quán cà phê thoải mái, nơi bạn có thể thư giãn và thưởng thức những ly cà phê thơm ngon trong không gian yên tĩnh. Đối với những khách hàng yêu cầu ẩm thực Halal, khách sạn có nhà hàng Halal riêng biệt, đảm bảo phục vụ các món ăn phù hợp với tiêu chuẩn dinh dưỡng và tôn giáo. Dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày giúp duy trì sự sạch sẽ và thoải mái cho khách lưu trú, mang lại trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng hoàn hảo và tiện nghi.

Trải nghiệm phòng nghỉ đẳng cấp tại Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc

Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc mang đến đa dạng lựa chọn phòng nghỉ sang trọng và rộng rãi, phù hợp với mọi nhu cầu của khách hàng. Bạn có thể lựa chọn các biệt thự như Villa 2 phòng ngủ với hồ bơi riêng, diện tích 261 mét vuông, hoặc các biệt thự 3 phòng ngủ, 4 phòng ngủ, đều có hồ bơi riêng và không gian thoáng đãng, lý tưởng để tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ đẳng cấp cùng gia đình hoặc nhóm bạn thân. Đặc biệt, các loại phòng như Villa 2 phòng, 3 phòng, 4 phòng đều đi kèm vé vào VinWonders và Safari, mang lại trải nghiệm giải trí tuyệt vời ngay trong chuyến đi của bạn.

Khi đặt phòng qua Agoda, bạn sẽ nhận được mức giá tốt nhất cùng quá trình đặt phòng nhanh chóng, dễ dàng, không gây phiền hà. Hệ thống của chúng tôi giúp bạn so sánh và chọn lựa phòng phù hợp nhất, đảm bảo chuyến đi của bạn diễn ra suôn sẻ và trọn vẹn. Đừng bỏ lỡ cơ hội sở hữu những ưu đãi hấp dẫn và trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng đẳng cấp tại Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc!

Khám phá vẻ đẹp của Gành Dầu - Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam

Gành Dầu là một điểm đến tuyệt vời trên Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam, nơi bạn có thể khám phá vẻ đẹp tự nhiên tuyệt đẹp và tận hưởng không gian yên tĩnh và thư giãn. Với bờ biển dài và cát trắng mịn, Gành Dầu là một trong những bãi biển đẹp nhất trên đảo. Bạn có thể thả mình trên bờ biển, tắm nắng hay ngâm mình trong nước biển trong làn nước trong xanh và trong suốt. 

Không chỉ có bãi biển tuyệt đẹp, Gành Dầu còn nổi tiếng với những cảnh đẹp thiên nhiên độc đáo. Bạn có thể đi dạo trong rừng nguyên sinh xanh mát, khám phá các thác nước và hồ nước trong khu vực. Nếu bạn muốn tận hưởng khung cảnh hùng vĩ, hãy leo lên đỉnh núi Gành Dầu để ngắm nhìn toàn cảnh biển cả và những cánh đồng xanh tươi. 

Ngoài ra, Gành Dầu cũng có những nhà hàng và quán cà phê nằm sát bờ biển, nơi bạn có thể thưởng thức các món ăn đặc sản địa phương và thưởng thức cà phê ngon. Hãy dành thời gian để khám phá Gành Dầu và tận hưởng những trải nghiệm đáng nhớ trên Đảo Phú Quốc.

Hướng dẫn đi từ sân bay gần Đảo Phú Quốc đến Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc

Đảo Phú Quốc nằm ở phía tây nam của Việt Nam và có hai sân bay gần đó là Sân bay Quốc tế Phú Quốc và Sân bay Rạch Giá. Để đến Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc, bạn có thể sử dụng các phương tiện giao thông công cộng hoặc thuê xe.

Nếu bạn đến từ Sân bay Quốc tế Phú Quốc, có một số cách để di chuyển đến Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc. Bạn có thể sử dụng dịch vụ xe taxi hoặc dịch vụ xe đưa đón của khách sạn. Thời gian di chuyển từ sân bay này đến đích khoảng 30 phút. Ngoài ra, bạn cũng có thể thuê xe máy hoặc ô tô để tự lái. Điều này sẽ cho phép bạn di chuyển thoải mái và khám phá đảo Phú Quốc theo ý muốn.

Sân bay Rạch Giá cũng là một lựa chọn để đến Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc. Từ sân bay này, bạn có thể di chuyển bằng xe taxi hoặc xe buýt đến cảng Rạch Giá. Từ cảng Rạch Giá, bạn có thể lên tàu cao tốc đến cảng Dinh Cậu trên đảo Phú Quốc. Từ đó, bạn có thể sử dụng dịch vụ xe taxi hoặc xe đưa đón của khách sạn để đến Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc. Thời gian di chuyển từ sân bay Rạch Giá đến Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc là khoảng 2-3 giờ, tùy thuộc vào điều kiện giao thông.

Khám phá các điểm đến xung quanh Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc

Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc nằm trong khu vực có nhiều điểm đến hấp dẫn, như VinWonders Phú Quốc, Vinpearl Safari Phu Quoc và Làng chài Rạch Vẹm. VinWonders Phú Quốc là một công viên giải trí tuyệt vời với nhiều trò chơi thú vị và khu vực thủy cung đẹp mắt. Du khách có thể khám phá các loài động vật hoang dã tại Vinpearl Safari Phu Quoc, nơi có hơn 100 loài động vật sống tự nhiên. Làng chài Rạch Vẹm là một điểm đến thú vị để trải nghiệm cuộc sống của ngư dân và thưởng thức hải sản tươi ngon.

Nhà hàng xung quanh Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc

Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc nằm gần một số nhà hàng nổi tiếng như Giraffe Restaurant, nha hang cooi, 40six Bistro, Corona Food Center, Jack's Italian Restaurant, Nemo, Seashell, 40six Beach Haus, #JMT Korea Restaurant và The Delight. Với sự đa dạng về món ăn và phong cách, du khách có thể tìm thấy những món ăn ngon từ khắp nơi trên thế giới. Từ những món ăn Ý tinh tế tại Jack's Italian Restaurant, đến món ăn truyền thống Việt Nam tại nha hang cooi, hay cả món ăn Hàn Quốc tại #JMT Korea Restaurant, du khách sẽ có nhiều lựa chọn để thỏa mãn khẩu vị của mình. Dù bạn muốn thưởng thức hải sản tươi sống tại Seashell hay thưởng thức một bữa ăn ngon trên bãi biển tại 40six Beach Haus, bạn sẽ tìm thấy những nhà hàng đáng chú ý ngay gần Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc.

Giá phòng trung bình tại Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc so với giá phòng trung bình tại cùng thành phố

Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc là một kỳ quan nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời tọa lạc tại Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam. Với giá phòng trung bình là $314, đây là một lựa chọn đẳng cấp cho những ai muốn trải nghiệm sự sang trọng và tiện nghi tuyệt vời.

So với giá phòng trung bình của các khách sạn khác tại Đảo Phú Quốc, Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc có mức giá cao hơn. Trung bình, giá phòng tại thành phố này là $75. Tuy nhiên, sự đáng giá của Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc nằm ở chất lượng dịch vụ và tiện ích đẳng cấp mà khách hàng nhận được. Với những tiện nghi hiện đại, hồ bơi lớn, nhà hàng sang trọng và không gian nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt đẹp, đây là một nơi lý tưởng để thư giãn và tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ hoàn hảo.

Trải nghiệm tuyệt vời tại Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc

Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc là một nơi nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời với nhiều đánh giá tích cực từ khách hàng. Phòng rộng rãi, có hồ bơi riêng tư tuyệt đẹp. Phòng sạch sẽ, nhân viên thân thiện và bãi biển đẹp. Lựa chọn đồ ăn phong phú, dịch vụ tuyệt vời. Các biệt thự rộng lớn và sạch sẽ! Cơ sở vật chất tuyệt đẹp. Nhân viên rất thân thiện. Chúng tôi đã có một kỳ nghỉ thú vị khi bữa sáng ngon với nhiều lựa chọn. Bữa trưa tự chọn tuyệt vời, sạch sẽ và có nhiều sự lựa chọn. Chúng tôi đã có một thời gian thú vị tại Vinpearl. Chúng tôi thực sự thích kỳ nghỉ của mình.

Sự hài lòng của khách hàng với Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc

Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc, nằm tại Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam, đã nhận được những đánh giá tích cực từ khách hàng với tổng điểm 8.6/10. Khách hàng đánh giá cao sự giá trị và tiện nghi của khách sạn với điểm số lần lượt là 8.7/10. 

Khách sạn này cũng nhận được những đánh giá tốt về sự sạch sẽ với điểm số 8.4/10. Vị trí của khách sạn cũng được đánh giá là 8.4/10, cho phép khách hàng dễ dàng tiếp cận các điểm tham quan và khu vực xung quanh. 

Điểm số cao nhất trong các tiêu chí đánh giá là 9.0/10 cho hiệu suất của nhân viên. Khách hàng đã đánh giá cao sự chuyên nghiệp và tận tâm của nhân viên, mang lại cho khách hàng những trải nghiệm đáng nhớ và thoải mái. Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai muốn tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời và được phục vụ tận tâm.

tags.tag: Cơ sở vật chất cho trẻ em
Tiện ích tại cơ sở lưu trú

demographics.name: Gia đình có thanh thiếu niên

sample_comments.text:
Dịch vụ đón tại sân bay đến việc tiễn khách đều được chuẩn bị rất chu đáo, nên việc di chuyển thật sự rất tiện lợi.

Khu nghỉ dưỡng khá rộng, chỉ cần bấm số nội bộ 1, trong vòng 5 phút sẽ có xe điện đến đưa bạn tới bất kỳ đâu trong khu nghỉ dưỡng. Không hề có cảm giác bất tiện khi di chuyển.

Tòa nhà không hoàn toàn hiện đại, nhưng biệt thự có hồ bơi rất rộng, phù hợp cho chuyến đi gia đình. Đặc biệt, với các gia đình có trẻ nhỏ, việc được chơi đùa thoải mái trong hồ bơi riêng mà không cần phải ngại ngùng là điểm tuyệt vời nhất.

Khu nghỉ dưỡng còn có bãi biển riêng, có thể đi ra biển ngay lập tức và cá nhân tôi cảm thấy sạch sẽ hơn nhiều so với bãi biển Sao, vì vậy sự hài lòng của tôi rất cao.

Ngoài ra, đi bộ đến VinWonders chưa đầy 5 phút, và việc sử dụng VinBus thuận tiện cho việc di chuyển đến các khu du lịch phía Bắc, vì vậy vị trí cũng rất thuận lợi.

Nhân viên cũng rất thân thiện, và vì nhân dịp sinh nhật, họ còn chuẩn bị bánh cho tôi, điều này khiến tôi rất cảm động.

Buffet sáng có nhiều loại món và chất lượng tốt, tôi cảm thấy hài lòng và mỗi ngày đều được dọn dẹp, cung cấp nước suối và đồ uống miễn phí trong phòng, nên cũng giảm bớt được phần nào gánh nặng.

Tổng thể, tôi cảm thấy khu nghỉ dưỡng rất phù hợp cho các chuyến đi gia đình có trẻ nhỏ, và nếu quay lại Phú Quốc, tôi muốn ở đây thêm một lần nữa.
sample_comments.title: Món canh hầm gà cảm động
sample_comments.response:
Dear Valued Guest - Euije,

Warm greetings from the management team.

Thank you very much for sharing such a thoughtful review of your recent stay with us. We are truly delighted to know that your journey from the airport pick-up to the departure transfer was smooth and comfortable, and that our buggy service helped make moving around the resort convenient despite the large property area.

It is especially rewarding to hear that your family enjoyed the spacious pool villa and the privacy it offers. Creating a relaxing environment where families---especially those traveling with children---can enjoy their time together is one of our top priorities. We are also pleased that you had the opportunity to enjoy our private beach and found it clean and relaxing compared with other nearby beaches such as Sao Beach.

We are glad our location added convenience to your trip, with easy access to VinWonders Phú Quốc just a short walk away and transportation via VinBus to explore the northern attractions
sample_comments.room_type: Villa 2 phòng ngủ có hồ bơi riêng

sample_comments.title: Chấp nhận được
sample_comments.negatives: Nhân viên không nhiệt tình, hồ bơi dơ

sample_comments.text: Chúng tôi đã ở lại Phú Quốc trong hai đêm vào cuối kỳ nghỉ. Biệt thự có hồ bơi rất sạch sẽ và rộng rãi, rất thoải mái cho một gia đình bốn người. Các cô con gái rất thích hồ bơi của khách sạn và đã bơi hàng ngày, nhưng đã vô tình va đầu và mũi vào nhau, nên chúng tôi đã phải đến phòng y tế. Chúng tôi đã sử dụng ứng dụng dịch trên điện thoại để giao tiếp với bác sĩ, và bác sĩ đã xử lý rất suôn sẻ. Sau khi hỏi về thuốc giảm đau và muốn chườm lạnh cho chỗ bị thương, bác sĩ đã bôi dầu vào mũi cho chúng tôi. Chi phí cũng miễn phí và đó thật sự là dịch vụ rất đáng quý. Chúng tôi cũng đã sử dụng bữa buffet vào buổi sáng và buổi tối, với nhiều món ngon và phong phú. Tôi đặc biệt khuyên bạn nên chọn cho chuyến du lịch gia đình.
sample_comments.title: Bạn có thể yên tâm sống.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Valued Guest - YUKAKO,

Thank you so much for your kind words and for sharing your wonderful experience with us at Vinpearl Wonderworld Phu Quoc!
We're thrilled to hear that you enjoyed your stay and appreciated the great service from our staff. Your satisfaction is our top priority, and knowing that you had such a positive experience means the world to us.
We can't wait to welcome you back for another fantastic stay. Please feel free to reach out to us directly for any assistance with your next visit---we'd love to make it even more memorable!
Warm regards,
Ngo Viet Hung (Mr.)
Duty Manager - Vinpearl Wonderworld Phu Quoc
sample_comments.room_type: Villa 2 phòng ngủ có hồ bơi riêng

sample_comments.title: Kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời cho cả gia đình.
sample_comments.positives: Thực đơn bữa sáng phong phú, đa dạng. Đồ ăn khá ngon.
sample_comments.negatives: Thực đơn phục vụ tại phòng chưa phong phú. Cơm hơi khô.

sample_comments.text:
Chúng tôi đã mua vé không hoàn lại và chuyến bay bị hủy khiến chuyến đi vào tháng 6 phải dời lên tháng 4.

WonderWorld đã hỗ trợ miễn phí việc đổi ngày, nhờ đó chúng tôi có thể có một chuyến đi vui vẻ.

Chúng tôi có ba đứa trẻ nên phải sử dụng phòng hai giường hoặc phòng nối liền, và dự định ghé thăm VinWonder, vì vậy khi tìm khách sạn gần nhất, chúng tôi đã quyết định chọn WonderWorld, đó là một lựa chọn rất tốt.

Với sự chu đáo và dịch vụ tốt của nhân viên, chuyến đi trở nên rất hạnh phúc.

Cá nhân tôi thấy tốt hơn cả Vinpearl Nha Trang.
Tình trạng và kích thước phòng, bữa sáng cũng rất ngon, chúng tôi đã có một kỳ nghỉ thú vị mà không gặp phải bất tiện nào.

Cảm ơn WonderWorld
Năm tới, chúng tôi dự định đến khách sạn phía nam Phú Quốc, nhưng cũng muốn thêm một lần nữa WonderWorld vào lịch trình của mình^^
sample_comments.title: Tôi xin giới thiệu những gia đình lớn có trẻ em.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Valued Guest - 뽀,

Thank you very much for your kind review.

We are delighted that we could assist with your date change and contribute to a pleasant and memorable stay for your family. It is wonderful to know that you were satisfied with our service, accommodations, and convenient location.

We truly look forward to welcoming you and your family back again in the near future.

Best regards,

Giang Yen Anh (Ms.)
Duty Manager - Vinpearl Wonderworld Phu Quoc
sample_comments.room_type: Villa 2 phòng ngủ có hồ bơi riêng

sample_comments.title: Tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives: Dịch vụ tốt, phòng sạch sẽ, Buffet sáng ngon
sample_comments.negatives: Ngoài khu vui chơi của Vin, gần đó ko có chợ hay khu sinh hoạt bình thường của người dân, chỉ là các tòa nhà đã được xây thương mại để bán

sample_comments.text:
Để kỷ niệm sinh nhật lần thứ 70 của cha, chúng tôi cần một chỗ ở lớn cho cả ba thế hệ cùng đi du lịch. Kết quả là chúng tôi khá hài lòng với chỗ ở này.

Ưu điểm:
Chỗ ở rộng rãi và ga trải giường thoải mái.
Xe buýt dễ dàng đến nơi.
Bữa sáng khá ngon.
Cơ sở vật chất được bố trí tốt.
Đất rộng rãi, tạo cảm giác thoáng đãng và có cảnh đẹp.

Nhược điểm:
Đất quá rộng nên nếu không đi xe buýt thì di chuyển rất khó khăn.
Bể bơi riêng nhỏ hơn mong đợi và có vẻ không được vệ sinh tốt (nước có quá nhiều côn trùng nổi).
Nước ra có màu nước rỉ và vòi sen bị hỏng.
Điện hay bị tắt giữa chừng (sớm được khôi phục), nhờ vậy mà tivi tự bật và tắt.
Không có lò vi sóng.
sample_comments.title: Thật tuyệt vời cho chuyến đi gia đình!
sample_comments.response:
Dear Valued Guest - Jiyoung,

Thank you for your kind review! We're delighted you had a pleasant stay and look forward to welcoming you again soon.
Best regards,

Giang Yen Anh (Ms.)
Duty Manager - Vinpearl Wonderworld Phu Quoc
sample_comments.room_type: Biệt thự 3 phòng ngủ có bể bơi riêng

sample_comments.title: Rất vui, tốt, sạch đẹp. Đây là lần thứ 15 nghỉ ở Vin, riêng phú quốc là lần thứ 3.
sample_comments.positives:
Ăn sáng đa dạng món, ngon, phục vụ tốt
Phục vụ phòng hơi tệ, dọn ẩu k lau bàn ăn, phòng dọn phòng không dọn, mình ở Villa 3 phòng ngủ mà dọn 2 phòng riêng phòng mình k dọn, bàn ăn dơ k lau.
Ăn ở nhà hàng gọi món, không đa dạng món. Đa phần món tây, món Việt ít món hơn. 
Vị trí ở Bắc đảo nên hơi xa trung tâm, đi xuống trung tâm và sân bay khá xa, có xe bus hỗ trợ, nhưng đi cực, vì đông người. 
Biển êm đẹp sạch, y tế hỗ trợ rất tốt, vì đi 2 vợ chồng bệnh hết, có y tế của Vin hỗ trợ rất chu đáo.

sample_comments.text: Chỗ nghỉ được xây dựng độc lập thành từng căn ở mỗi hồ, điều này rất tốt, và điều khiến chúng tôi ngạc nhiên hơn là các tiện nghi bên trong chỗ nghỉ đã thu hút chúng tôi. Chúng tôi đã đặt phòng cho 4 người, nhưng không thể thấy ở Hàn Quốc với kích cỡ lớn như vậy với một phòng khách và bếp rộng lớn, 3 phòng ngủ, 2 giường cỡ king-size mỗi phòng và 2 giường siêu đơn. Trước phòng khách có một bể bơi riêng, oh~ đồ dùng trong phòng không phải là chất lượng cao cấp nhưng vẫn đủ tốt để sử dụng, và mỗi phòng đều có phòng tắm riêng với đầy đủ đồ dùng vệ sinh sạch sẽ, rất tiện lợi để sử dụng. Chỉ cần bước ra ngoài nhà là có một khu vườn được chăm sóc kỹ lưỡng, đi dạo xung quanh cũng giúp chúng tôi thư giãn, và chỉ cần đi bộ một đoạn là đến bãi biển~ Bãi biển cũng rất đẹp và khi chúng tôi đến vào cuối tháng 12, nhiệt độ nước không quá lạnh, thật sự rất tốt để tắm biển. Chúng tôi cảm thấy rất hài lòng với kỳ nghỉ mà chúng tôi mong muốn~ Món ăn và đồ uống tại nhà hàng ven biển cũng rất ngon~ Đây là chuyến đi gia đình đầu tiên đến Phú Quốc, và chúng tôi đã có một kỳ nghỉ rất hài lòng tại Vinpearl Wonderworld Phú Quốc~ Agoda đã hỗ trợ chúng tôi rất nhiệt tình trong vòng 21 giờ, và tôi thực sự nghĩ rằng việc đặt phòng qua Agoda là một quyết định đúng đắn. Xung quanh khách sạn cũng có nhiều địa điểm tham quan, rất tốt cho việc tham quan xung quanh~ Khách sạn có dịch vụ đưa đón rất tiện lợi~ Tôi rất recommend~ Không nhận phí viết bài, tôi đánh giá 5 điểm trên tổng số 5 điểm.

sample_comments.title: Linen management and customer service needs to be brought up to par with the rest of the resort.
sample_comments.positives:
The resort itself is visually stunning and the two villas were spacious for our large group of 19.

The breakfast buffet was high quality with great variety of options.

The beach is close by, clean, and enjoyable.
sample_comments.negatives:
Critical Bedding Issues: We had two villas and added two guests. One guest was left without a blanket for one night and another for three nights.

Towel Management: On our final full day, the entire group of 19 was left without bath or hand towels for over 7.5 hours in both villas. This was particularly problematic as we had just returned from snorkeling and the beach and were unable to shower.

Poor Service Recovery: When these failures were brought to management's attention, the compensation offered was a 1.67% credit that could only be used at certain venues. This "compensation" felt like an insult given the scale of the service failures for a group of our size.

Inflexible Management: We found the staff and management to be unhelpful in resolving these basic service gaps in a timely or fair manner.

Both of the issues stem from improper linen management. If they don't have the replacement on hand, they should not take it out. The hand and bath towels should have been left in place rather than removed by housekeeping which left everyone without anything until we called multiple times.

sample_comments.text: Not worth the stay. Requested for cutlery but reception required security deposit for it. First time encountered this kind of requirement for a 5 star hotel.

sample_comments.title: Did not worth the price
sample_comments.positives: I would say safari and ocean were better.
sample_comments.negatives: I would say It was not clean and fake hospitality. Staffs are angry mostly frown faces everywhere. Towels bed linings are so old. Furnitures are so old. On the photo they look nice and clean but it was not. Dirt is everywhere under the bed and inside the cabinets. Pool was not clean. Housekeeping just wipe the floor and leave. It was not worth the price. It was like staying in 2 3 star hotel.

sample_comments.title: Vinpearl Wonderworld...a world of wonders why it's rated 5 stars
sample_comments.text:
Definitely stay way from this place if you're looking for a home away from home. We rented several villas for our group of friends and families in Jan 2023. Advertised as villas so we all thought they would have basic things like utensils, pots and pans or a microwave but we were wrong. There's a big kitchen in each villas but cooking is not allowed and yet this was not mentioned anywhere in their listing when we booked unless they changed it recently due to the complaints received. I asked to borrow a few plates & utensils for my villa and they wanted to charge $400,0000 vnd and was told unless this was paid, they will not bring it to our villa (this is a fee charged and not a deposit where you get it back at checkout). At the pool, the kids wanted to play with a floatie but we were told it was $100,000 vnd to hire for an hour. I saw a dad with a young child wanting to use the floatie but was also told he needed to hire it. I find this is so so wrong. Then there's massive maintenance issues with the villas. The front door of our villa didn't work on a couple of occasions so they had to change the batteries on the lock. There's no hot water in all villas so we had cold showers everyday. The safe in some of the villas didn't work. Toilets in some villas were blocked and had terrible sewage smell in the bathroom the whole time they were there. Bus service to Grand world is only available from 5pm. Vinpearl, you can't rate yourself 5* and charge a premium price if you can't provide a service to match. The price we paid for the villas ranged from $450 to $830AUD per night but your villas and the service provided was appalling. Some of your management personnel lacks basic management experience and one even gave the poor buggy driver a death stare & spoke to him rudely because apparently he was picking up guests at the non designated pickup area. 
If you intend to response to my feedback, I hope it's a more personalised one addressing the above rather than a generic one
sample_comments.response:
Dear Valued Guest,
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. While we wish you had a better experience, it is feedback like this that we learn from and use to improve. At Vinpearl, we strive to provide an outstanding service experience for all customers; So, your feedback about the things that you have not felt satisfied with is extremely important to us. Please reach out to us if you would be willing to give us a chance to turn your experience around. 
Please contact us by phone: +84 787986786 for support or you need to talk directly to get specific feedback about your issues
It would be a pleasure to welcome you back to our hotel! 
Best regards,
The Hotel Management Team
Vinpearl Discovery Wonderworld Phu Quoc

sample_comments.title: Highly recommend not to stay in this hotel if you don't want to spoil your vacations
sample_comments.positives: Nice beach, fast shuttle bus on territory, huge and quiet place
sample_comments.negatives: That's my first time leaving a comment, having first time such bad experience of staying in the hotel, way not 5 star hotel. Twice they brought pillows with the bugs in it, not even once mapped or even swept the floor for our 7days stay, stuff doesn't want to accept their faults. We ordered fish and chips, but they brought chicken nuggets instead, when I asked to change it to fish, they claimed that it's a fish, only 10-15 minutes of arguing with me they took the plate back, and after 30 minutes the cook apologized for their mistake and changed the dish. Not refilling water until call and ask for it. They add water to freshly squeezed juice for 100000VND, when you ask not to add water, they give you half of the glass. If you want to feed your baby, you need to rent one plate and one fork for 200000VND. all villas stinks in the toilet rooms and from A/C. Poor variety of food at the buffet. The bed sheets are short.

sample_comments.title: Shittiest holiday I ever had
sample_comments.text: So I would say only two positive things about this place. First rooms are spacious comfy beds, secondly very friendly staff but god for sake no one speaks proper English. So every time you have to repeat what you said like 5 times so they can understand or at least try to understand what you're saying. On the first day when we check in to the villa we found huge cockroach in bathroom. Rooms are disgustingly dirty. Housekeeping barely cleans the villa. They use same cleaning cloth for every surface, basically they will wipe the toilet and use that cloth to wipe the table. No vacuum cleaning, floors are dirty af. And you guys will be wondering why the hell I didn't called to housekeeping services ask them to clean the villa or ask the supervisor to do it. As I mentioned above no one speaks English! Its useless to tell them how to clean and what to clean. So we went to supermarket and bought some cleaning supplies on our own. It says villa has a kitchen, but you cant cook or use it. There is no microwave to heat the food. Now lets talk bout food! Food is soo bad! Tasteless, whatever you order it is tasteless no salt at all. Its better to go to city center for dinners. Breakfast buffet are soso. So after staying here for 10 days I would not recommend this place for simple 3 reason: no one speaks proper English, food is bad, rooms are disgustingly not cleaned.
sample_comments.response:
Dear valued guest Enerel,

Thank you for choosing Vinpearl Wonderworld Phu Quoc. We appreciate your detailed feedback and apologize for the challenges you faced.

While we're glad you found our rooms spacious with comfy beds and our staff friendly, we're deeply sorry your overall experience fell short. We take your concerns about cleanliness seriously and will investigate and address them promptly.

Effective communication is crucial, and we'll provide additional English proficiency training for our staff. Your feedback on food quality is noted, and we'll work to enhance our offerings.

We apologize for any inconvenience and are committed to making necessary improvements. If you consider giving us another chance, we'd be grateful. Thank you for bringing these issues to our attention.

Best regards,

Le Phuoc Nguyen (Alex)
Duty Manager - Vinpearl Wonderworld Phu Quoc

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.positives: Property has a great pool area, great facilities for the kids, very family friendly resort, next door to VINWONDERS.
sample_comments.negatives: Was far from the hustle and bustle, to get to the main spots on Phu Quoc it was 45-60min drive which was annoying. Very conservative resort by the pool in regards to swimwear attire.

sample_comments.title: Not 5 star Hotel by international travel standards
sample_comments.text: Language barrier as English is very limited. Service lacks attention to details for example booked a villa for 8 ppl, arrived to find 8 bottles of water but only 2 coffee cups. As the kitchen was not fully stocked with dishes, utensils, pots or pans, we asked housekeeping for more coffee cups and was told there were more cups in our bathrooms and to use those. No language barrier here as one of my family members spoke Vietnamese. Seriously, a 5 star hotel expects us to brush our teeth and rinse of mouths with the bathroom cups and then wash the same cups and use it for coffee! Arrived also to find that there is only one safe in the whole villa and it was not working, on top of that it was portable as in it is not fastened to any hard surface. Anyone can just pick it up and walk off with it. Furthermore, after a day of touring one of the amusement parks we arrived back to our villa to find that it was unlocked with the front door ajar. Apparently, the cleaning staff forgot to lock our villa after they finished cleaning it! Not a good cleaning job either as they only do a wipe down of our bathrooms. Furniture and rugs in the villa were stained and dirty to begin with. It would of been cheaper, cleaner and safer to book a regular hotel room then the overpriced dorm rooms posing as luxury villas here. Overall, would not come back here again. The only good thing about this place is it's location.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Ms. Sindy,

sample_comments.title: Overall, we had a comfortable stay. If we were to come back, it would only be because of the beautiful beach and sea.
sample_comments.positives: The beach is fantastic. Beautiful sand. The sea is extremely comfortable.
sample_comments.negatives:
The Villa is very old and although they try to maintain it, it is already worn out. There are no beach towels and when I called them and told them that we need beach towels daily they said you can use the shower towels.. my response. Was that then bring us each person three towels because we take 2/3 showers daily and we cannot use the same towels for the beach..
So the situation with the towels was somewhat very inconvenient and uncomfortable . At the beach they have a tent with towels. which was pretty far away from the villa, which is OK understandable they did have beach towels. We went there to get towels and they said that maximum they can give us is four towels although we were six people and the Villa fits eight so that was again an issue. 
The breakfast was OK but the rest of the food only room service that food is uneadible. 

They clean the room daily, but they don't really do a good job.. They do not change the sheets. We paid extra money to the cleaning crew so they could change the sheets at least twice a week.

Lastly, if you are staying in a beachfront villa, the pool is very far away.

Have to make a note that the workers and all the staff is very friendly and if you ask for anything, they will try to do what they can to accommodate you .

sample_comments.title: Photos online are inaccurate
sample_comments.text: Rundown rooms. Dirty private pool that I don't even wanna get in. Shared pool is small. Bathrooms in the villa was horrible. It was moldy and the pillow case smell musty. Sofa was stained. Far from the airport. The only thing is that it is 5 mins walk to wonder world and Haven beach club is pretty nice. However Poor food options at the resort and around it. I would never stay there again. I paid $*** a night include breakfast only. Totally not worth it.

sample_comments.title: Subpar
sample_comments.text: The villa was poorly maintained, evident from the weak water pressure and lack of basic cleanliness, including finding hair on surfaces. The service was consistently inadequate: our room service order did not include enough plates, and a request for extra utensils took so long that they arrived only after we had finished eating. Furthermore, although we were correctly charged for an additional guest, the villa was not stocked with corresponding towels and amenities , requiring another delayed request. Most unprofessionally, staff pressured us to provide a 5-star review online and, when we declined, deflected our valid concerns about the experience by blaming maintenance issues. Last but not least, we were promised for a late check out but then we received a letter indicating there will be a charge if you check out after noon (we requested 2pm late check out). This overall lack of accountability, combined with the substandard conditions, made for a highly disappointing stay.

sample_comments.positives: Breakfast variety is their buffet is really big. Their complementary transportation to/from airport. Location is really close to the major attractions and they also provide free transportation to these attractions.
sample_comments.negatives: This resort was nothing like we expected, the place is nice but this hotel is 3 or 4 stars at most. I have booked a villa with three rooms, bed quality and the pillows are really bad, the finishing of the villa and bathroom are really really not 5 stars standard. The staff are trying their best but their English is not good and their supervisor are avoiding speaking to me, they show that they are busy with something but definitely not the comfort of their guest. I might be harsh on this hotel but I have stayed at the oriental Jade hotel in Hanoi and Voco hotel in Da nang and believe me there are a big difference in the cleanliness standards and the staff quality. However, it is really crowded which maybe explains the poor service and cleaning. Every time we come back to the villa after cleaning the villa we don't see any towels, nether a used one or a clean one. The buggy service some times takes 30 minutes to come and pick you up. Breakfast buffet is like free market, people and noise every where, the minute you step in you want to disappear as fast as possible.

sample_comments.title: Resort was very far from where all the action was.although the resort we had was huge, it was old and not very well main
sample_comments.positives: Staff were wonderful and amazing. Buffet had good variety of food. Tuk tuk service was quick.
sample_comments.negatives: Very far from everything. Facilities were old. The pool that came with our resort was old and did not look well kept. We needed up never using the private pool. The flooring in the house had raised edges and if you weren't careful can potentially cut your feet.

sample_comments.title: Not worth staying
sample_comments.text:
The villa is really nice but there are very limited restaurant in the resort and they are really bad value. The hotel immediately gave my what's app phone number to the random grab/taxi people out the front of the hotel who sent me messages every day on my phone :(. They took a picture of me and my friend's faces at check in, this was then used for facial recognition to access the breakfast area which seemed very unnecessary. From how quickly the front desk staff gave my phone number out having facial recogniton was an identity theft concern .
The local area is extremely tacky and there are streets full of empty buildings. To get to the local area you have to take a cart to the front desk and then a bus. We did this for every meal except breakfast because of the high prices and poor service at the restaurants.
We had one meal at the hotel for lunch on the day we arrived. The the food was nice but very expensive. We ordered drinks that did not arrive until 15 minutes after we had finished eating our meal and the staff did not offer us any water while we waited.

We stayed 3 nights at a 4 bedroom villa with a swimming pool. The moment when we walked into this villa is a bit disappointed because we could feel the dust on our bare feet. Bathrooms need a good scrub

sample_comments.title: Not what we expected
sample_comments.text: When you rent a villa you expect basic amenities like bowls, enough coffee cups for each guest, beach towels, and water to drink. We were very surprised to find out that these villa did not include these. The villas itself are beautiful, new and clean however the pool was broken which they didn't manage to fix and the overall atmosphere felt chaotic and disorganized. When we asked questions about why the villas weren't equipped none of the staff were helpful and each answer was different. Even a simple question of how do we get to the beach was not even clearly stated on the hotel map nor could the hotel staff explain it to us. The breakfast was tasty but wouldn't recommend the rest of the food. The whole experience was a massive let down and we felt as if we were sold an experience that didn't exist. It wasn't a warm feeling walking into the lobby and that was a foreshadowing of how the rest of the trip went. It's a big shame as the beach is beautiful and this could be a a amazing space.

sample_comments.title: Beautiful facilities with subpar service.
sample_comments.positives: The room was very spacious and private with its own terrace and pool. It has easy access to a clean beach and the internal shuttle service is usually available within 5 minutes. The pool outside the main building is also nice.
sample_comments.negatives:
**Communication:**
- Communicating with the staff proved incredibly challenging, as most had limited English proficiency, including the managers.
- The confusion around the internal shuttle was frustrating. For instance, when asking about the bus for the safari, we faced delays in getting an answer, only to see the bus depart without us.

**Pool:**
- While the private pool seemed promising, it was consistently filled with bugs, and the absence of a cleaning net meant we had to contact reception every time we wanted to use it.
- The unexpected charge for inflatable toys at the supposedly luxurious pool added to our disappointment. When offered by another guest who paid for it, staff told us that we couldnt ise it, or at least they made an X with their arms and kept pointing at us

**Service:**
- Lack of a concierge service was surprising and inconvenient. We were left without local information assistance, making our stay less enjoyable.
- When asking about the Vinwonders etc, they told us to download the app and that they couldn't help us any further. 
- The overall check-in process took over 15 minutes, despite minimal simultaneous arrivals, adding an unnecessary wait to our experience.

Gym was small, spa was not as clean as expected, pool was just next to the check in lobby. Breakfast buffet was served but the cleaniness needed to be improved. sample_comments.text: Staff's english is very poor, and services are more or less 2-3 star hotel like. The room is big with a nice pool which is why I booked, and it ended up being the only nice thing. Safari was alright but grand world had not much to offer except the water show. Breakfast buffet was chaotic, the food was very similar throughout our 3n stay. There's not much to sight see around the resort as the resort is too big and just a ghost town in general. Almost 90% of guests are locals, and really do not expect a good quality of service from staff unless you are talking to managers who can speak English fluently. I would not visit again.

sample_comments.title: Overall a decent experience but I expected a bit more for the price we were paying
sample_comments.positives: The property was well designed for tourists and close to the beach. The breakfast had a lot of variety and an easy system for recognition. The free tuktuks and shuttle buses were a great bonus.
sample_comments.negatives: The daily room cleaning was not really up to standard. I understand that there are many many villas and rooms to clean but if that's the case, I think there should be more staff so there is atleast daily vaccuuming. One day they would give us face towels and another day they wouldnt so it was quite frustrating. Our door sensor broke one day because the door hinge was broken and the door would slam shut constantly so we were stuck outside for about 20 minutes as we waited for someone to come and fix it.

sample_comments.title: Quite a horrible experience for a 5 stars resort
sample_comments.text:
The excitement went down pretty quickly after arrival. The way Vinpearl setup their check-in was really hectic and questionable. 
Guests staying in Villas will have the same check in desk as Guest staying in the single room on the upper floor. Also, they require you to take photo for facial recognition for the morning buffet. As a result, if you check in behind a big group, good luck waiting for your turn. 
We did our check in (2 family of 4 adults and 2 kids each) before the big group coming in and still take in total 50 mins to finish the check in process. I can't imagine how they will handle their workload during peak season. 
Once we got to our room, several items are broken/not working. To make the matter worse, all of the phones in the bedroom were broken and we have to call from the phone in the toilet. 
Going between the front lounge (where you can catch bus, taxi, having morning buffet, etc.) will require pick up/drop off using electric bus. During normal time, it takes about 5-10 mins for them to arrive. That's no problem. 
However, when you checking out, because the demand for the bus increase, you have to allow at least 30 mins for the bus to come and pick you up. 
The location is also far from Phu Quoc's central area so if you want to eat local specialties, prepare to pay around 800,000 VND both ways to go to the Center to eat and back. 
So will I stay here next time I visit Phu Quoc? No way.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr. Quan,

Thank you for choosing Vinpearl Discovery Wonderworld Phu Quoc and taking your time to share your feedback about a recent stay. We do sincerely apologize for the shortcoming of services that you have experienced. At Vinpearl, we strive to provide an outstanding service experience for all customers.
So, your feedback about the things that you have not felt satisfied with is extremely important to us, we do appreciate and working on it to improve the service.

It would be such a pleasure to personally welcome you back to our hotel! 

Best regards, 
Vinpearl Discovery Wonderworld Phu Quoc

sample_comments.title: Really Bad
sample_comments.text: The villa's pool was extremely dirty. We found a snake and a dead frog in the pool, and the water was full of rubbish. I paid for a villa with a private pool specifically so I could swim in privacy, but I was unable to use the pool at all during my stay. Although it is a coastal area, the buffet did not offer many seafood options. They only served low-quality blue crab and a few snails. That was all they had for seafood.

Dear Valued Guest - Ms.Truc,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback with us.

We sincerely regret to learn that your experience did not meet your expectations, particularly regarding the cleanliness of the private pool. We understand how disappointing it must have been to encounter these issues and be unable to fully enjoy a facility that was an important part of your stay. Please accept our sincere apologies. Following your feedback, we have reinforced our pool inspection and cleaning procedures with the responsible teams to ensure a cleaner and more comfortable environment for our guests.

We also appreciate your comments regarding the seafood selection at our buffet restaurant. sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text:
I stayed at Vinpearl Wonderworld Phu Quoc with my family for three nights, and unfortunately, the experience was disappointing.
The hotel offers airport transfer, but the experience was poor. We had to wait for all arriving guests and were then transported in a large bus with an unpleasant smell. It was not a private car or small shuttle, even though we were a family of six.
The resort is extremely crowded, and due to the high number of guests, there is very little attention to individual guests. The buggy transportation service to and from the villas was particularly bad --- very slow, sometimes requiring up to 15 minutes of waiting. During peak hours, there was even a waiting list to use the buggies when returning to the villa.
We booked a two-bedroom villa with a private pool, but the condition was very poor. The furniture was old, the private pool was dirty and not suitable for swimming, and when I reported this issue, I was told it would take four days to clean it --- even though my stay was only three days. The backyard was also not clean, and I even saw a frog there. Additionally, there was no hot water from the bathroom sink, and overall cleanliness was below acceptable standards.
The staff are generally professional and friendly, as is common in Vietnam, but it was clear that the large number of guests made it difficult for them to provide proper service. For example, at breakfast, the egg station chef treated me rudely when I asked for my eggs to be cooked well done. She became visibly annoyed and threw the eggs away.
The restaurant was extremely crowded, tables were not cleared quickly, and food options were limited. There were very few halal or vegetarian choices. I was also asked to sit at a table I did not request, despite asking for a different one.
Overall, due to overcrowding, poor villa condition, slow internal transportation, and service issues, this stay did not meet expectations.
sample_comments.response:

Warm greetings from Vinpearl Wonderworld Phu Quoc.

Thank you very much for taking the time to share valued detailed review regarding your recent stay with us. We truly appreciate your feedback, as it helps us understand our customer's experiences and identify areas where we can continue to improve.

First and foremost, we sincerely regret to learn that your stay did not meet your expectations. Please accept our apologies for the inconveniences you encountered during your visit.

Regarding the airport transfer service, kindly allow us to clarify that our complimentary shuttle service provided for the convenience for all of customers. The shuttles service is offered and operated in cooperation with a licensed transportation partner, and vehicles are scheduled to accommodate multiple families efficiently. We appreciate your understanding of this arrangement. And we also sincerely regret that the experience did not fully meet your expectations.

Concerning the high occupa

sample_comments.title: Disappointed but the staff were great!
sample_comments.text:
Our stay was unfortunately disappointing overall. The property felt run-down, and the villa was not maintained to the standard we expected for the price.

Upon arrival, it was clear the room had not been properly cleaned or prepared for new guests. The villa pool was dirty, and the pump was not functioning --- we had to contact the front desk three times before it was resolved. The private pool deck and outdoor area were also poorly maintained. The chairs were dirty, the sunbeds were wet and unclean, and the outdoor pillows were filthy and mouldy. This made the space uncomfortable to use and was especially disappointing given that the private pool area is meant to be a highlight of the villa experience.

Inside the villa, the condition was equally concerning. The pillows and curtains were dusty, which triggered my son's asthma. The carpet had clearly not been vacuumed and felt sticky underfoot, which was very unpleasant. There were also visible gaps in the flooring, which felt unsafe.

Housekeeping was inconsistent throughout our stay. Used towels were removed during cleaning but not replaced, and we had to call twice on separate occasions to request fresh towels. We also found lizard droppings in the room, and there were lizards inside the villa, so we had to keep all food covered or refrigerated at all times. In addition, the power tripped daily, although each outage was brief.

Breakfast options were limited, with no halal choices available apart from vegetarian items.

The kids' club was underwhelming. The toys and facilities appeared old and worn, and the space could benefit from updates to make it more engaging for children.

On a positive note, the staff were attentive and genuinely tried their best to assist whenever we raised concerns. While their English was somewhat limited, we were able to communicate using translation apps without much difficulty. The private beach was beautiful and was definitely one of the highlights of our stay.

However, for the price paid, we expected significantly better maintenance, cleanliness, and overall hygiene standards. There are other properties in a similar price range that offer far better upkeep and overall experience. Based on our stay, we believe you can find better options elsewhere with much better hygiene and value for money. If the place was maintained and refreshed, we would have recommended our friends and families. But Unfortunately, it wasn't and we would not choose to return.

We chose this resort because of its location to VinWonder, the Safari, and the private pool; however, if we were not visiting those places we would not have chosen this resort. While the villa was roomy, dining chairs had a lot of stains on the seat cushion, one of the two master bathroom accent lights was missing a light bulb, kitchen did not have napkins nor paper towels despite having room service (when we ordered from room service we were also not provided with any napkins??). Tuk Tuk drivers - some were nice/polite, some looked at you as if you are an annoyance. Buffet was not good despite the variety offered. None of the juices were fresh, unlike other resorts we have been to in Vietnam (in Danang and Lang Co). We will not be returning to this resort.

The property looks its age. The villas are rough around the edges, with wooden patios breaking under your feet outside your villa.
Furniture inside our villa, 6706, was terribly stained and gross in parts.
Cleanliness was also an issue. On day one, we got into our pvt pool, which was littered with bugs. They will come and clean but they can only so much.
I noticed the lounge chair next to the pool had a beer can and used glasses wedged underneath from the previous occupants. I informed the reception to plz have it picked up the next day as I have twin toddlers who have a tendency to crawl into spaces and pick stuff up.

sample_comments.title: Run down with terrible food
sample_comments.text:
We decided to stay at the Vinpearl due to its location and proximity to kid friendly activities but were rather disappointed. The villa are lovely and spacious but very run down. We got the safari room for the kids and the teepee were falling apart. The villa has a full kitchen but no cooking utensils and a not saying please don't use the kitchen. 
The rooms are a little run down and need maintenance but overall the actual rooms were great.

The food at all the restaurants in this hotel was awful except the breakfast buffet. It took ages to come out and was actually bad.

My other large issue with this resort was it states that it has a kids club. Now our plan was to use it once or twice so that we could have a massage or a drink together however you can't actually leave your kids unsupervised in kids club! An adult from your party needs to be there to supervise. It didn't have unpaid activities organized and was actually a tiny room with some small play equipment. 

Overall a bit disappointed with the resort but it really depends on what you are after.

sample_comments.text:
My recent stay at Vinpearl left a lot to be desired. 

One of the most concerning aspects of my stay at this hotel was the requirement for guests to allow Vinpearl to collect every guest facial recognition data and use across all of Vingroup products, with no alternative option provided. This raised serious privacy concerns, and I was left with little choice but to comply if I wanted to stay at the hotel. The lack of transparency regarding how this data would be used or protected made me feel uncomfortable and uneasy. I would have preferred if the hotel had provided more information about their use of facial recognition technology and offered guests the option to opt-out if they were uncomfortable with it.

To make matters worse, guests were not allowed to use the kitchen during their stay despite advertised with full kitchen access, and required to pay to rent plates and utensils if they wanted to eat in their room. This was not made clear during the booking process and was an unexpected expense. It felt like an unnecessary inconvenience and added extra costs to my stay.

Additionally, the bathroom in my room had a noticeable slant to the floor, causing water to collect and not drain properly. This made it difficult to use the shower without getting water all over the bathroom floor. The toilet was also clogged and required multiple attempts to fix, which was not a pleasant experience.

The private pool was also disappointing. It appeared to be poorly maintained, with dirt and debris visible on the surface of the water. It was not a comfortable or appealing place to relax.

Overall, I had a disappointing and uncomfortable stay due to the numerous issues I encountered. From the concerns around facial recognition data and the lack of transparency, to the problems with bathroom functionality, kitchen access, pool cleanliness, and the time-consuming process of requesting service, I cannot recommend this place to others.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr. Hien,

Thank you for choosing to stay with us and for sharing your experiences about your recent stay.
We do sincerely apologize for the shortcoming of services that you have experienced.
Our team might have not had oversight of the amenities and not delivered the information with proper communication, which has caused such an embarrassing situation - especially, for our security method - facial recognization system. We acknowledge that we could do better in managing all procedures of our services. 
I hope this unexpected event would not mar the impression you had of Vinpearl, and please rest assured that your feedback was shared with our relevant departments for further follow-up and improvement. 
Once again, we do apologize for any inconvenience caused and hope to have another chance to welcome you back to our resort.

Sincerely,
The Hotel Management Team
Vinpearl Wonderworld Phu Quoc

sample_comments.title: Not worth the money
sample_comments.text: I will not stay here again if I ever come to Phu Quoc. Food is not good, swimming pool in my villa room is so dirty. Even though we requested to clean the pool but they only the surface of the pool. The bottom of the pool is full of moss. Staff is over work and the hotel itself is very chaotic and stressful environment. We pay a lot of money but we didn't get the services we paid for. The resort said all inclusive but it's not. The floaters at the swimming pool is extra money, bikes also need to rent, billiards is only for people who order drinks. What kind of inclusive resorts is that. I will never come back here or recommend to anyone. Do your own research before you come to any Vinpearl resorts.

sample_comments.title: Great pool, beach and chilling time
sample_comments.positives:
The 2 bedroom villa was very comfortable and incredibly spacious. The shuttle around the property by golf carts were reasonably fast and walking was also an option at times. The spa and fitness center were also a highlight, well resourced. Our private pool was always clean, despite the trees around and the regular rain during the wet season.
There was a variety of options on the breakfast as well as lunch and dinner buffet. Room service and pool bar had limited options, and waiting time was quite long. Location is convenient if you're interested in spending time at the amusement park or Grand World.
sample_comments.negatives:
We were disappointed with a few rules not communicated clearly and upfront. The hotel has a restaurant dress code and you are only informed at the door, when checking-in for breakfast. We were caught unprepared and unaware twice, and noticed many others in the same situation. Regardless, guests should be informed before check-in. 
Guests in general were not very aware of others in our experience. People desperately reaching for food in front of you, cutting lines to have a word with the front desk before you. Not a hotel problem, but stains the experience.

sample_comments.title: no value to stay in this resort
sample_comments.text:
we rent a villa during our stay. 
- To many soot flying around in the villa and outside our private pool. ( this is big problem for health and experince)- it cause from dirty 
- Private pool is dirty 
- The service is slow and not for customer ( too many adding fee compair to other 5 star in Phu quoc)
- Staff are nice, but whole problem is from policy and management 
Not recommend and not to comeback.

Dear Mr. Duy,
Thank you for choosing to stay at Vinpearl Discovery 1 Phu Quoc as well as leaving compliments to our staff. 
We do sincerely apologize to you because of the short-comings of our services has caused during your stay.
As for your feedback, I understand your frustration with our services during your most recent stay. However, I hope you understood that the weather at Phu Quoc is one of the reasons why there were some insects. We have been taking some measures to keep all our guests safe from it.
Additionally, our team might not have oversight of the amenities and services which has caused such an embarrassing situation. I acknowledge that we could do better in managing all procedures of our services. Please be confident that we are taking appropriate measures to solve the problem and not to repeat it in the future.
Once again, we do apologize for any inconvenience caused and hope to have another chance to turn your experience around.

Vu Thanh Mai
General Manager.

You have buses every hour for Grand World which is a great option if you want to explore a little bit and dine out.

The pool's side fountains weren't working and after they fixed it it was splashing out and the pool emptied a little every day. sample_comments.title: Beautiful villa on the beach
sample_comments.positives: Gorgeous villa on a beautiful beach. The villa itself is huge and very spacious. It's close to VinWonders and Vin Safari which were great days out for the children. We used the villa pool every day and also used the resort pool a few days. The weather was stunning whilst we were there and we enjoyed Christmas.
sample_comments.negatives:
We asked for some extra amenities and felt that it took staff a long time to organise these items to the villa. It was Christmas and we wanted to celebrate and asked for 4 wine glasses. They could only provide 2 and said if we wanted 2 more, we'd be charged for rental. Bearing in mind, the villa was a 3-bedroom villa booked for 6 people, I thought this was quite unacceptable. 
We also had a problem with the pricing of the Christmas Eve gala which was sorted whilst we were dining that night, quite unprofessional. We understand that is was a very busy time however mistakes were made quite a lot. We even received an email after checking out about a price discrepancy.

sample_comments.title: Uh
sample_comments.text:
Starting with the good things. Very responsive and proactive staff. Good breakfast. The spa was very nice. 

Now the non-nice. The pictures on Agoda for 3 bedroom villa with private pool are entirely misleading. The pics are apparently for 3 bedroom villa with ocean view. The furniture, the view - it's not what the pics on Agoda make you believe. The staff came over immediately and we went over the agoda app together for this booking and they agreed the pics looked different from the room but they later called us to say those pics were for the ocean view villa. Well. 

There's a kitchen in the villa but you have to pay and rent pans and pots from them. And you have to ask them to turn on the induction heaters. We have a baby and they agreed to give us the pans for free. The baby chair has to be rented, there's no baby bath tubs. 

There's a nice big pool but the shower room next to it has no option to change clothes or locker or hair dryer or body wash or shampoo or even hooks to hang your clothes from. It's just a shower. 

It's a nice big hotel with wifi everywhere and a good breakfast with lots to improve.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for taking the time to share such a thoughtful and detailed review following your recent stay with us. We are truly pleased to know that you enjoyed our team's responsiveness, the breakfast selection, spa services, and the resort's overall facilities.

At the same time, we sincerely apologize for the aspects that did not meet your expectations. We truly regret any confusion regarding the villa photos displayed on Agoda. Please rest assured that your feedback has been shared with our Sales and Marketing teams to review the listings and ensure the descriptions and images accurately represent each room type.

We also appreciate your comments regarding the kitchen equipment, baby amenities, and the pool shower area. Your observations are valuable and have been forwarded to the relevant departments for review and improvement, as we constantly strive to enhance the comfort and convenience of our guests.

Should you wish to share more details or suggestions, plea

sample_comments.title: Good
sample_comments.text:
we were travelling together with my brother couple. The hotel I think is basically for local people. Thy hygiene that controlled by staffs is not well organized. we had breakfast every morning, lot of local travellers used their fingers to pick up food, bread, ice, etc. Guest and children were running inside of the restaurant and lobby. Some guest wore pajama slept on the sofa in the lobby. The cleaners not well cleaned our room. One rubbish under the vanity never been moved away since one checked in the room. I took and picture and shown to the floor manger who did take photo from my mobile phone, but the rubbish were sat there till out checking out. The insufficient supplies of the room were always lacking hand towel or others. There is kitchen in the villa, but no cooking ware, not dish, not towel, no drinking glasses. we phoned and requested them, but need to pay rentals for each items. We ordered 4 meals for 4 of us and asked 4 sets of cutleries, but we need to pay additional charges. After long negotiation, we got them without charges. This is unacceptable and ridiculous. 
we had been to one of the 4 Vinpearl hotel before Covid-19, it was much better than our recent trip. we all thought that hotel has changed their policies to entertain and accept local guests as majority.
We like to visit Phu Quoc Island, but not this hotel anymore. The floor manger, Thuan was helpful.

sample_comments.title: Perfect family holiday stay
sample_comments.positives: Very modern villas, generally clean, nice furniture and decor and beautiful private pool. Good and steady WiFi throughout the resort, nice resort pool, a small but sufficient kids club, pool tables and board games at the lobby bar but closes early, The Haven is a nice beach restaurant! It's a huge resort but buggy's are available 24/7 to move around, staff are very friendly, we got upgraded to a 3 bedroom villa! Our stay included free access for one day at VinWonders and the buggy dropped and picked us up. Location is up north and very quiet, perfect for a nice family holiday.
sample_comments.negatives:
1. Breakfast could definitely improve, very limited non pork options and other cuisines. I also spoke to the supervisor about how mixing pork and chicken sausages in one pot or having one thong for all is not right.

2. Two lizards were found in the room, a pest-man was sent immediately, though he caught them with bare hands!!

3. Very heavy dust under the beds, called housekeeping at night to do deep cleaning, I think deep cleaning should be done weekly for all villas.

sample_comments.title: It was awesome
sample_comments.positives: Everything was good, got a villa to stay with family, requested for a cake for our daughter's birthday as a surprise and arranged it very well. We had a wonderful sea food dinner, great arrangements , nice beach, overall superb
sample_comments.negatives: Housekeeping needs to be improved

sample_comments.title: First family holiday in Phu Quoc
sample_comments.text:
We loved the villa as it was big, spacious and nice to be with all the family (6 of us). The layout was great but the rooms are looking a bit tired. Decor is getting old. We had problems with the toilet in the middle bedroom as it kept leaking. We called the staff for help but they came 2x and it was still the same. 
DO NOT get room service after 6:30pm. You will not get it until 1hr 40mins later. 
The staff had very limited English which made it hard with communication. 
Pool was nice and kids club had various activities available. 
We joined their Xmas "Snowflakes"... Vinpearl really know how to put on a show. 
We came across some lovely staff (front desk) and managers/supervisors and Chefs. 
My youngest has various food allergies. They were generally well catered for apart from room service where they served us a dish with nuts in. 
As a whole, we had a lovely time there. Its in a good location if you want to go to Vin Wonders or the safari.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Valued Guest Mabel,

Greetings from Vinpearl Wonderworld Phu Quoc,

I am writing to express my sincerest apologies for the disappointing experience you had during your recent stay with us. Your feedback is invaluable in helping us improve our service, and I would like to thank you for taking the time to share your concerns with us. 

Please rest assured that we are continuously working to improve our facilities to ensure a more comfortable and enjoyable experience for all our guests.

If you give us a chance to earn back your trust, I can assure you that we will do our best to delivery the great experience that so many of our guests have grown so fond of. We hope to have another chance to welcome you back at Vinpearl Wonderworld Phu Quoc.

Sincerely,
Nguyen Dang Huy (Mr.)
Duty Manager - Vinpearl Wonderworld Phu Quoc

sample_comments.title: Exceptional

sample_comments.title: Family holiday
sample_comments.text:
Luxury once you walked in. Pros are clean beach, nice peaceful location, shuttle bus accessibility, large villa great for larger group. We had a 5 bedroom villa so the 3 teens get a room each. Cons : long list.... Quality of the house, are not great, leaking showers, aircon in one room doesn't work, no laundry facility in the house so you'll have to get laundry done outside or hand wash your wet clothes. They ration your water and I was annoyed since we can't drink tap water and there isn't a mini mart in the resort, you'll have to walk out to the VinWonders to get to a minimart. The staff scolded me for filling up my water bottle which I thought was really rude since it's just water. My kids drink 2liters a day and they only give 8bottles a day for 5 of us. When we ask for more they said they would charge us. Seriously? A bottle of water is like USD 0.30 each in the minimarts. We paid a lot for the villa and all our dining in at the resort, I'm pretty sure they could give us unlimited water bottles for all the guests. Or give a large 5L bottle each day for us to refill our bottles. The private pool was good but no-one cleans it. There are 1000 bugs in it and we don't have a net to scoop them ourselves. When you stay for a whole week it becomes a problem, almost unusable. The resort is huge so I think they should have more facilities, like tennis courts, basketball, Pickleball, more water sports at the beach eg: SUPs, kayaks. No toilet at the beach either and no buggy ride from the beach back to your villa which is very inconvenient. It's a long walk when you stay far away from the beach. 

The food at the resort is super expensive especially for a family of 5. You'd be looking at spending quite a bit everyday as there are no where else to go to have lunch and dinners. 

Even at the sports bar we would spent an average $100-200 a meal for 5 of us. If I compare to other 5 star resorts in Thailand, Fiji, Bali , this place has a lot of pros if you have thousands to spend.
sample_comments.response:
Dear valued guest Joo,

Thank you for taking the time to share your detailed feedback following your recent stay at Vinpearl Wonderworld Phu Quoc. We are pleased to hear that you enjoyed the villa's spaciousness, the peaceful location, beach access, and shuttle bus service. It's also great to know that the villa layout suited your family well.

We sincerely apologize for the inconveniences you encountered. Your comments about the maintenance issues are noted, and we will address them immediately to prevent future occurrences.

We understand the importance of providing convenience and comfort, especially during a longer stay, and will work towards improving the amenities. 

We appreciate your constructive feedback and hope that, despite these challenges, there were memorable moments during your stay. It would be a pleasure to welcome you back and offer you a better experience in the future.

Warm regards,

Brendan VAN ZYL
General Manager
VINPEARL WONDERWORLD PHU QUOC

sample_comments.title: Vinpearl Wonderworld Review
sample_comments.text: Overall, my experience at this resort was quite good. The staff is quite friendly, but there is no consistency in service so I had a bit of trouble ordering drinks here. The room's design is quite nice, but some details are old and degraded. Waiting time for the bus from the villa to the Clubhouse or other facilities is quite long. The food here is delicious, I really like the quality of the buffet food and room order.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Ambience, grandeur, variety of food selections for breakfast and top notch customer service 24/7
sample_comments.negatives: None in particular

sample_comments.title: A mixed review. Lots to love and room for improvement.
sample_comments.text:
We upgraded at the desk on arrival to a beach villa and it was worth it. 

The villas have maintenance issues though - door handles, towel rack, leaking water. All fixed quite quickly, but annoying. 

As two families though - paying separately, we've had our issues. 1 safe in the 4 bed villa, they only have capacity to store a single credit card on file and had no real solution to separate our charges.

The pool bar is woefully understaffed and the wait for food and drink is atrocious- plus we had the issue of charging to our room separately. We followed the advice of the receptionist and wrote our names on the bills and signed separately, but we had issues with one bar staff combining charges and getting angry with us for asking to separate it. Also and hour and a half way for lunch and one round of drinks is just not ok!

Good access to Vin Safari, Vin Wonders and Grand World.

The breakfast buffet is great.

Also, the resort had a limit of $300 AU exchange for each room per night. The rate was pretty good though.

I guess the over arching issue is that the communication hasn't been great and you feel you need to drag info out of them, to get the full picture.

I respect their limitations with money exchange, but it would've been easier to know the whole story upfront, rather than the drip feeding of differing stories till we got to the bottom of things.

I don't think we'd come again sadly. This is our 3rd VinPearl experience, and the only one with frustrations and disappointment.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Ms. Nirelle,

Thank you for taking the time and making the effort to provide us with feedback on your recent stay.

We appreciate your feedback about our service and we apologize for any inconvenience it may have caused. Our team works hard to provide all of our guests with exceptional service and experiences, and we take all comments and suggestions seriously. We will certainly take your feedback into consideration as we continue to improve our offerings.

Thank you again for choosing our resort, and we hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you back soon for another unforgettable stay.

Warm regards,
Vinpearl Wonderworld Phu Quoc

sample_comments.title: 시설과 직원분들에 대하여
sample_comments.text:
숙소 시설은 다낭 나트랑 2곳보다 숙소시설은 맘에 들지 않는다. 이유는 숙소 위생 상태와 청소 상태가 엉망진창이다. 침대 아래 와 쇼파 아래를 보았는가!잊어버린 물건을 찾으려 무심코 보았는데 .... 이건 사람이 수면하고 쉴수 있는 곳이 아니다, 천장 펜을 돌리면 카페트 먼지와 아랫부분에 쌓여있는 먼지가 공중에 올라와 서 목/피부에 치명적으로 해로웠다. ,개인풀장은 더러움 자체였다 2번의 청소 요청에도결과는 맘에들지 않았다. 5일 숙박을 하면서 3일부터는 에어컨도 거의 틀지 못했다. 정말 최 악의 청경상태이다. 그러나 툭툭이 드라이버 및 로비 직원들의 친절함에 감사를 한다. 정말 친절했고 따뜻하게 맞아주고 체크아웃 할때는 로비 직원의 미소가 내맘을 녹였다.언제가 직원들의 검강과 행복과 그들의 가족의 
행복을 기원한다
sample_comments.response:

We apologize for the disappointment you experienced during your stay. We have noted your concerns about the cleanliness and maintenance issues in your room, and we are committed to addressing and rectifying these matters to ensure such oversights do not reoccur.

We also apologize for any inconvenience you faced with the personal pool and the air conditioning. Our technical team will investigate these issues to ensure a more comfortable stay for all our guests.

On a brighter note, we appreciate your kind words about our dedicated drivers and lobby staff. Their warm and welcoming service reflects our commitment to genuine hospitality.

We value your feedback, and we hope to have the opportunity to provide you with an improved and satisfying experience in the future. Best wishes to our team members and their families.

Warm regards,

Vinpearl Wonderworld Phu Quoc

sample_comments.title: Surjoué mais rien d'un hôtel de luxe
sample_comments.positives: Le buffet petit déjeuner du matin, la chambre était spacieuse, leur réactivité quand on a un problème.
sample_comments.negatives:
Une soirée surf&turf hyper cher ou on nous promet barbecue, finalement, on nous sert 2 langoustes coupées en 2, avec une grosse sauce qui prend le dessus sur tout et 0 goût de grillade. Le spectacle de feu ou les « artistes » nous envoient du feu dans la tête. La musique était bien trop forte et tapait sur le système nerveux avec des « chanteurs » qui chantaient faux et mal. C'était insupportable pour les enfants.
Les buggys qui mettaient trop de temps à arriver.
La cuisine était vide, même pas de couverts, donc inutile, il n'était pas possible donc de s'en servir, autant ne pas en mettre.
Les climatisations étaient inutiles également, nous avions trop chauds. 
La télévision n'était pas smart donc inutilisable et inutile. 
Les coussins extérieurs étaient sales.
La baignoire ne se bouchait pas, nous n'avons jamais pu prendre de bain.
Il y avait des fourmis partout, on était posé quelque part, nos corps étaient pleins de fourmis, impossible de se détendre 
On est loin de tout, dans une ville fantôme.
Le personnel était souriant mais gênant. Par exemple, quand on rentrait le code de notre carte bleue, la serveuse regardait attentivement.
La chambre ne se verrouillait plus.
La piscine était bien mais il y avait des endroits inaccessibles pour nous et pas pour d'autres clients... on se sent surveillé et jugé comme des enfants.
Bien que je parle vietnamien, personne n'a voulu me parler... on me répondait dans un anglais très approximatif. Le personnel ne comprenait rien, on dirait que c'était que des stagiaires.
Le bar était sous staffé, nous avions trop attendus avant que quelqu'un ne prenne notre commande, nous avons abandonné l'idée de prendre quelque chose.
